messages.content: Choose operator action for Alexanderplatz restricted airspace breach.

message.content: {"agent":"commander","recommended_action":"detour_obstacle","confidence":0.89,"operator_message":"Reroute southeast around Alexanderplatz restricted airspace now — autopilot will breach in ~6 seconds.","why":["Vision confirms the autopilot corridor crosses the Alexanderplatz no-fly zone.","Zone Monitor estimates breach in 6.5 s at current speed.","Battery reserve still covers the 140 m detour and delivery completion."],"rejected_actions":[{"action":"continue_mission","reason":"Continuing on autopilot crosses restricted airspace within seconds."},{"action":"hold_position","reason":"Hovering inside the approach corridor still risks boundary breach."},{"action":"return_to_start","reason":"A detour preserves the delivery; abort is unnecessary."}],"evidence_refs":["vision.frame_003","telemetry.2026-06-28T100008Z"]}

normalized_output.operator_message: Reroute southeast around Alexanderplatz restricted airspace now — autopilot will breach in ~6 seconds.
why: Vision confirms the autopilot corridor crosses the Alexanderplatz no-fly zone.
Zone Monitor estimates breach in 6.5 s at current speed.
Battery reserve still covers the 140 m detour and delivery completion.

rejected_actions.reason: Continuing on autopilot crosses restricted airspace within seconds.
Hovering inside the approach corridor still risks boundary breach.
A detour preserves the delivery; abort is unnecessary.
